site.title: Yapei Community Online
site.description: Connect with Yapei residents. Discover local events, community stories, and opportunities to get involved in Ghana's vibrant Yapei community.

index.title: Yapei Community Online | Connect & Share
index.description: Join Yapei Community Online to connect with residents, discover events, read stories, and support community development.

blog.title: Blog | Yapei Community Stories & News
blog.description: Read inspiring stories, local news, and articles from Yapei community members. Share your voice and connect with neighbors.

events.title: Events Calendar | Yapei Community Activities
events.description: Discover upcoming events in Yapei including durbar festivals, health screenings, cultural celebrations, and community gatherings.

about.title: About Yapei Community Online | Our Mission
about.description: Learn about Yapei Community Online platform, our mission to connect residents, and how we support community development.

contact.title: Contact | Get Involved with Yapei Community
contact.description: Contact Yapei Community Online to volunteer, share ideas, partner with us, or provide feedback. We'd love to hear from you.

post.title: Community Story | Yapei Online Platform
post.description: Discover stories from Yapei community members sharing experiences, insights, and connections.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy | Yapei Community Online
privacy.description: Privacy policy for Yapei Community Online. Learn how we protect your data and personal information.

terms.title: Terms of Service | Yapei Community Online
terms.description: Terms of service for Yapei Community Online platform. Please review our guidelines and policies.

organization.name: Yapei Community Online
organization.description: A centralized platform for Yapei residents to connect, share local intelligence, and support mutual development.
